matchers.value: ^HP Comware Platform Software Comware Software Version ([^\s,]+)[,\s]\s*(?:Release|Alpha|Beta)\s*(\S+) HP (\S+) Router
^HP Series Router (\S+) HP Comware Platform Software Comware Software Version ([^\s,]+)[,\s]\s*Release ([^,\s]+)?[,\s].*Copyright
^HP Series Router (\S+) HP Comware Platform Software Comware Software Version ([^,]+), (\S+) Copyright
^HP Comware Platform Software, Software Version ([^\s,]+)[,\s]\s*(?:Release|Alpha|Beta)\s*(\S+) HP (\S+) (?:SI|EI|Switch|Copyright|v\d)
